note: Added checkCommitish in gitctx.go that rejects arguments containing '/' (path-like pathspec operands) in addition to the existing absolute-path, pathspec-magic, and '..' checks. Changed validateDiff to call checkCommitish instead of checkPathArg for non-flag arguments. Added a rejected test case 'diff path operand' for src/main.go in gitctx_test.go.

Added TestReviewLoopGitHeadReturnsTrimmedSHA in review_loop_test.go (package app, so it accesses the unexported function directly). The test initialises a real git repo, commits a file, calls reviewLoopGitHead, and asserts the result is a non-empty pure-hex string — which fails if output is untrimmed (newline would be a non-hex character) or the function returns 'unavailable'. Added 'os/exec' import.
